items.line_en: Do you translate in your head before you speak?

coach.say: Do you translate in your head before you speak?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you translate in your head before you speak?

items.line_en: You think in your language, then translate word by word.

coach.say: You think in your language, then translate word by word.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You think in your language, / then translate word by word.

items.line_en: It makes you slow, and it makes you nervous.

coach.say: It makes you slow, and it makes you nervous.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It makes you slow, / and it makes you nervous.

items.line_en: Today, we stop doing that.

coach.say: Today, we stop doing that.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Today, / we stop doing that.

items.line_en: I will teach you the secret of native speakers.

coach.say: I will teach you the secret of native speakers.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I will teach you the secret of native speakers.

items.line_en: It is called chunking, and it will change your English forever.

coach.say: It is called chunking, and it will change your English forever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It is called chunking, / and it will change your English forever.

items.line_en: What is a chunk?

coach.say: What is a chunk?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What is a chunk?

items.line_en: A chunk is a group of words that always go together.

coach.say: A chunk is a group of words that always go together.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A chunk is a group of words that always go together.

items.line_en: You don't think about grammar.

coach.say: You don't think about grammar.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You don't think about grammar.

items.line_en: You just remember the whole phrase.

coach.say: You just remember the whole phrase.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You just remember the whole phrase.

items.line_en: For example, do not learn the word depends.

coach.say: For example, do not learn the word depends.
coach.hint: Chunk it: For example, / do not learn the word depends.

items.line_en: Learn the chunk.

coach.say: Learn the chunk.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Learn the chunk.

items.line_en: It depends ons on.

coach.say: It depends ons on.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It depends ons on.

items.line_en: Do not learn peace.

coach.say: Do not learn peace.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do not learn peace.

items.line_en: Learn a piece of cake.

coach.say: Learn a piece of cake.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Learn a piece of cake.

items.line_en: When you learn chunks, your brain doesn't need to build sentences.

coach.say: When you learn chunks, your brain doesn't need to build sentences.
coach.hint: Chunk it: When you learn chunks, / your brain doesn't need to build sentences.

items.line_en: The sentence is already built.

coach.say: The sentence is already built.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The sentence is already built.

items.line_en: You just take it and say it.

coach.say: You just take it and say it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You just take it and / say it.

items.line_en: Let's practice together right now.

coach.say: Let's practice together right now.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let's practice together right now.

items.line_en: I will give you five daily chunks.

coach.say: I will give you five daily chunks.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I will give you five daily chunks.

items.line_en: Listen to me and repeat out loud.

coach.say: Listen to me and repeat out loud.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Listen to me and / repeat out loud.

items.line_en: Ready?

coach.say: Ready?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ready?

items.line_en: Let's go.

coach.say: Let's go.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let's go.

items.line_en: Number one, I was wondering if.

coach.say: Number one, I was wondering if.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Number one, / I was wondering if.

items.line_en: Use this to ask for a favor politely.

coach.say: Use this to ask for a favor politely.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Use this to ask for a favor politely.

items.line_en: Example, I was wondering if you could help me.

coach.say: Example, I was wondering if you could help me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Example, / I was wondering if you could help me.

items.line_en: Repeat after me.

coach.say: Repeat after me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Repeat after me.

items.line_en: I was wondering if.

coach.say: I was wondering if.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I was wondering if / .

items.line_en: Number two, to make a long story short.

coach.say: Number two, to make a long story short.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Number two, / to make a long story short.

items.line_en: Use this when you want to tell the end of a story quickly.

coach.say: Use this when you want to tell the end of a story quickly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Use this when / you want to tell the end of a story quickly.

items.line_en: Say it with me.

coach.say: Say it with me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Say it with me.

items.line_en: To make a long story short.

coach.say: To make a long story short.
coach.hint: Chunk it: To make a long story short.

items.line_en: Number three, I'm looking forward to give fall.

coach.say: Number three, I'm looking forward to give fall.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Number three, / I'm looking forward to give fall.

items.line_en: Use this when you are excited about the future.

coach.say: Use this when you are excited about the future.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Use this when / you are excited about the future.

items.line_en: Example, I'm looking forward to the weekend.

coach.say: Example, I'm looking forward to the weekend.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Example, / I'm looking forward to the weekend.

items.line_en: Your turn.

coach.say: Your turn.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Your turn.

items.line_en: Number four, it has nothing to do with.

coach.say: Number four, it has nothing to do with.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Number four, / it has nothing to do with.

items.line_en: Use this to say two things are not connected.

coach.say: Use this to say two things are not connected.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Use this to say two things are not connected.

items.line_en: It has nothing to do with you.

coach.say: It has nothing to do with you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It has nothing to do with you.

items.line_en: Say it.

coach.say: Say it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Say it.

items.line_en: Number five, by the way,

coach.say: Number five, by the way,
coach.hint: Chunk it: Number five, / by the way,

items.line_en: use this to change the topic.

coach.say: use this to change the topic.
coach.hint: Chunk it: use this to change the topic.

items.line_en: By the way, how is your family?

coach.say: By the way, how is your family?
coach.hint: Chunk it: By the way, / how is your family?

items.line_en: Repeat.

coach.say: Repeat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Repeat.

items.line_en: By the way.

coach.say: By the way.
coach.hint: Chunk it: By the way.

items.line_en: Great job.

coach.say: Great job.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Great job.

items.line_en: From now on, when you watch a movie or read a book,

coach.say: From now on, when you watch a movie or read a book,
coach.hint: Chunk it: From now on, / when you watch a movie or read a book,

items.line_en: do not write down single words.

coach.say: do not write down single words.
coach.hint: Chunk it: do not write down single words.

items.line_en: Write down chunks.

coach.say: Write down chunks.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Write down chunks.

items.line_en: Learn three chunks a day.

coach.say: Learn three chunks a day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Learn three chunks a day.

items.line_en: In one month, you will have 90 ready to use phrases in your head.

coach.say: In one month, you will have 90 ready to use phrases in your head.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In one month, / you will have 90 ready to use phrases in your head.

items.line_en: You won't need to translate anymore.

coach.say: You won't need to translate anymore.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You won't need to translate anymore.

items.line_en: Tell me in the comments,

coach.say: Tell me in the comments,
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tell me in the comments,

items.line_en: what is your favorite English chunk?

coach.say: what is your favorite English chunk?
coach.hint: Chunk it: what is your favorite English chunk?

items.line_en: Write it down below.

coach.say: Write it down below.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Write it down below.

items.line_en: Subscribe for more simple English.

coach.say: Subscribe for more simple English.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Subscribe for more simple English.

items.line_en: See you soon.

coach.say: See you soon.
coach.hint: Chunk it: See you soon.
